'''Tanniel''' was a military officer who served the [[Galactic Republic/Legends|Galactic Republic]] and the [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Galactic Empire]]. During the [[Clone Wars/Legends|Clone Wars]], he was appointed [[Moff/Legends|Moff]] of the [[Quelii Oversector]] under the [[Sector Governance Decree/Legends|Sector Governance Decree]] and assumed the role of commander of the [[Tenth Army|10th Sector Army]].<ref name="TEGtW" /> When [[Galactic Emperor/Legends|Emperor]] [[Palpatine/Legends|Palpatine]] [[Declaration of a New Order|declared]] his [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Galactic Empire]] in [[19 BBY/Legends|19 BBY]], Tanniel became one of the first twenty [[Grand Moff/Legends|Grand Moffs]]. He later oversaw development of the Imperial [[Storm commando/Legends|storm commandos]]. Tanniel placed [[Crix Madine/Legends|Crix Madine]] in charge of the first unit of storm commandos deployed during the [[Galactic Civil War/Legends|Galactic Civil War]].
